intent: URL shortener with user auth, create short URLs, redirect, click tracking, dashboard with stats, custom short codes, QR codes

tier1_claims.description: A new user can register with email, name, and password
A registered user can log in and receive an auth token or session
Unauthenticated requests to protected endpoints are rejected
An authenticated user can create a short URL by providing a destination URL

proof.expected: status in [200, 201], body contains ['example.com'], JSON has keys ['id', 'code', 'url']

tier1_claims.description: An authenticated user can create a short URL with a custom short code
Creating a short URL with a duplicate custom code is rejected
Visiting a short code URL redirects to the original destination URL
Each redirect increments the click count for the link

tier1_claims.description: The dashboard displays click count and link details for each short URL
A QR code can be generated for a short URL
Visiting a non-existent short code returns 404
Creating a short URL with an invalid destination URL is rejected
Registering with an already-used email is rejected
A user cannot see or manage links created by another user
Created short URLs persist and are retrievable after creation
User password is never returned in API responses

tier2_journeys.name: New User Creates Short URL And Views Dashboard
New User Creates Custom Short Code
New User Generates QR Code For Short URL
Returning User Updates And Deletes Short URL
Admin Views All Users And URLs
